base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of logo_icons — a ui from 1991 street fighter ii. Country-flag icons + region logos per character. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Country-flag icons + region logos per character
